description.value: Veterans Insulation Coin (VIC) is a utility token created by Veterans Insulation & Coatings LLC to recognize craftsmanship, integrity, and service within the building trades. VIC represents more than value; it stands for the dedication of veterans and skilled workers who build America’s future one project at a time.  Each VIC token reflects the company’s mission to combine professional excellence with the values learned through military service—discipline, precision, and trust. It supports fair-pay initiatives, training programs for veterans entering construction careers, and adoption of advanced, energy-efficient materials such as open- and closed-cell spray foam insulation.  VIC connects contractors, clients, and community members in a transparent on-chain ecosystem that rewards reliability, accountability, and sustainable results. It demonstrates how blockchain technology can bring honesty and innovation to real-world work—bridging digital assets with tangible performance.  Veterans Insulation Coin: Built by veterans. Backed by values. Driven by excellence.
